posts.label: Meme 1
posts.overlay_text: me trying to decide if I like him or just the potential of him
posts.fb_caption: Why is this so relatable though? 😂 We've all been here — talking ourselves out of and back into something at the exact same time. Tag a friend who needs to see this.

posts.label: Meme 2
posts.overlay_text: him: 'i'm not really looking for anything serious' — also him, texting every day:
posts.fb_caption: Okay but WHY is this the most relatable thing I've seen all week? 😅 Mixed signals are exhausting, ladies. Drop a 💀 if you've been here before.

posts.label: Quote 1
posts.quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
posts.fb_caption: This one hit different today. 💜 Sometimes what we've been through is exactly what opens us up to something more beautiful. Save this for a moment when you need a reminder. ✨

posts.label: Quote 2
posts.quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
posts.fb_caption: Simple. Powerful. True. 💜 You don't need everything figured out to take the next step — just begin right where you are. What's one thing you're doing for yourself today? Share below 👇
